module.name: gallery
module.description: Arranges several images with optional captions in an even card grid. Body = one image (plus caption line) per section.
module.aiSpec:
An IMAGE GALLERY — several images, each in a card with an optional caption, laid out in an even grid. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one section per item; each section is Markdown containing an image (e.g. `![](fig1.png)`) plus an optional caption paragraph below it. Use @gallery for a set of pictures; use @graph for a single figure that needs axis labels/caption, and @grid for text/content cards. Param: `columns` — number of grid columns, 1–6 (default 2); collapses to one column on narrow screens.
<!-- @gallery columns: 2 --> ![Proposed](results/proposed.png) Result with the proposed method <!-- @ --> ![Baseline](results/baseline.png) Result with the conventional method <!-- @end -->

param.name: columns
param.label: Columns
param.desc: Number of columns in the gallery grid

snippet.label: Image Gallery
snippet.text: <!-- @gallery columns: 2 --> ![Result 1](images/result-1.png) Plot result with the proposed method <!-- @ --> ![Result 2](images/result-2.png) Plot result with the conventional method <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Arranges images in an even grid.
